work.project_zzpizza_description: A complete online pizza ordering platform built for a real client. Features a dynamic menu, product configurator, cart, admin dashboard, and a discount system.
work.project_portfolio_description: The very site you're looking at — built with React Three Fiber for 3D WebGL, Framer Motion animations, Lenis smooth scroll, and a custom i18n system supporting EN / RU / CZ.
